title: THREE OF CUPS
subtitle: The Gathering / Joyful Play / Communal Harmony

generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. 2:3 vertical. Three young anthropomorphic leopard cats playing in a shallow, sparkling forest river. They hold golden cups up in celebration. Joyful splashes and ripples in the water. Lush greenery and overhanging branches create a safe canopy. Vibrant and harmonious scene. Full bleed. No borders.
generation.narrative: The Three of Cups is the 'Celebration of the Litter'—a group of adolescents playing in the safety of their home territory before dispersal.

meanings.upright: Celebration, community support, friendship, group harmony, and shared joy.
meanings.reversed: Gossip, isolation, or a excess that leads to a breakdown in group harmony.

ecology.mapping_note: Three of Cups represents 'The Safety of the Pack'—rare group play moments in high-quality habitats where resources are overflowing.

website.excerpt: A joyful gathering in the crystal river, celebrating the abundance and harmony of the forest life.
website.seo_description: Three of Cups reimagined as a joyful group of leopard cats playing in a safe riverbed.
